top_signals.title: Army launches new Indo-Pacific multi-domain command
top_signals.summary: The move combines traditional formations with some of the service’s cyber, space, unmanned systems and electronic warfare capabilities.

top_signals.title: Highway patrol: US Marine F-35s conduct flight operations on Finnish roads
top_signals.summary: The first ever deployment of U.S. Marine Corps F-35B Lightning IIs to Finland proved to be a memorable one.

top_signals.title: Would a £10bn VAT cut really save hospitality?
top_signals.summary: Calls for the government to slash VAT on hospitality firms have been backed by pub and restaurant bosses, and Prime Minister hopeful Andy Burnham. What would this tax break really mean for the economy? The UK’s pubs, hotels and restaurants say they are at breaking point. Higher business rates, hikes to national insurance and minimum [...]
